title: Unfunny SMP
description:
The official Modpack for the Unfunny.co SMP.

This modpack has various features specifically tailored to the Unfunny SMP - Primarily focusing on optimization & communication.
body:
The official Modpack for the Unfunny.co SMP.

 

This modpack has various features specifically tailored to the Unfunny SMP - Primarily focusing on optimization & communication. With mods like Voicechat, Xaeros world map, Zoomify & Sodium, we give the players quality of life alongside optimization to play the game how they want.
